controls.title: Audit and Assurance Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain audit and assurance policies and procedures and standards. Review and update the policies and procedures at least annually.

controls.title: Independent Assessments
controls.description: Conduct independent audit and assurance assessments according to relevant standards at least annually.

controls.title: Risk Based Planning Assessment
controls.description: Perform risk-based planning to determine the scope, schedule, and frequency of audit and assurance activities.

controls.title: Requirements Compliance
controls.description: Verify compliance with all relevant standards, regulations, legal/contractual, and statutory requirements applicable to the audit.

controls.title: Audit Management Process
controls.description: Define and implement an audit management process to support audit planning, scoping, execution, reporting, and remediation activities.

controls.title: Remediation
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain a remediation process for addressing audit findings and recommendations.

controls.title: Application and Interface Security Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for application security to provide guidance to the appropriate planning, delivery, and support of application security capabilities.

controls.title: Application Security Baseline Requirements
controls.description: Establish, document, and maintain baseline requirements for securing different applications.

controls.title: Application Security Metrics
controls.description: Define and implement technical and operational metrics in alignment with business objectives, security requirements, and compliance obligations.

controls.title: Secure Application Design and Development
controls.description: Define and implement a SDLC process for application design, development, deployment, and operation in accordance with security requirements defined by the organization.

controls.title: Automated Application Security Testing
controls.description: Implement application security testing as part of the software development lifecycle, using automation where feasible.

controls.title: Automated Secure Application Deployment
controls.description: Establish and implement strategies and capabilities for secure, standardized, and compliant application deployment, automating where possible.

controls.title: Application Vulnerability Remediation
controls.description: Define and implement a process to remediate application security vulnerabilities, automating remediation where possible.

controls.title: Business Continuity Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures.

controls.title: Risk Assessment and Impact Analysis
controls.description: Determine the impact of business disruptions and risks for each system and service through a business impact analysis and risk assessment.

controls.title: Business Continuity Strategy
controls.description: Establish strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite.

controls.title: Business Continuity Planning
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain a business continuity plan.

controls.title: Documentation
controls.description: Develop, identify, and acquire documentation that is relevant to support the business continuity and operational resilience programs. Make documentation available to authorized stakeholders and review periodically.

controls.title: Business Continuity Exercises
controls.description: Exercise and test business continuity and operational resilience plans at least annually or upon significant changes.

controls.title: Communication
controls.description: Establish communication with stakeholders and participants during events that invoke business continuity and operational resilience procedures.

controls.title: Backup
controls.description: Establish, document, and implement backup and recovery measures to ensure business and technology continuity, following the required objectives.

controls.title: Disaster Response Plan
controls.description: Establish, document, and implement a disaster response plan to address natural and man-made disasters.

controls.title: Response Plan Exercise
controls.description: Exercise and test disaster response plans at least annually, or upon significant organizational or environmental changes, to determine their effectiveness.

controls.title: Equipment Redundancy
controls.description: Implement redundant systems, equipment, and components so that the failure of a single point does not affect the availability of the system.

controls.title: Change Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for managing the risks associated with applying changes to organization assets.

controls.title: Quality Testing
controls.description: Follow a defined quality change control, approval, and testing process with established baselines, testing, and release standards.

controls.title: Change Management Technology
controls.description: Manage the risks associated with applying changes to organization assets, including application, systems, infrastructure, configuration, etc., regardless of whether the assets are managed internally or externally.

controls.title: Unauthorized Change Protection
controls.description: Implement mechanisms to detect and protect against unauthorized changes to organization assets.

controls.title: Change Agreements
controls.description: Include provisions limiting changes directly impacting CSCs CUI (controlled unclassified information) in third-party agreements.

controls.title: Change Management Baseline
controls.description: Establish baselines for all relevant organization assets that are subject to the change management process.

controls.title: Detection of Baseline Deviation
controls.description: Implement detection measures with proactive notification in case of changes deviating from the established baseline.

controls.title: Exception Management
controls.description: Define and implement a process for the management of exceptions in the change and configuration management process, including emergency changes.

controls.title: Change Restoration
controls.description: Define and implement a process for change restoration to rollback changes to a previous known good state in case of errors or security concerns.

controls.title: Encryption and Key Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for cryptography, encryption, and key management.

controls.title: CEK Roles and Responsibilities
controls.description: Define and implement cryptographic, encryption, and key management roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Data Encryption
controls.description: Provide cryptographic protection to data at rest and in transit, using cryptographic libraries certified to approved standards.

controls.title: Encryption Algorithm
controls.description: Use encryption algorithms that are appropriate for data protection, considering the classification of data, associated risks, and usability of the encryption technology.

controls.title: Encryption Change Management
controls.description: Manage changes to cryptographic, encryption, and key management systems, policies, and procedures in order to allow a readiness assessment.

controls.title: Encryption Risk Management
controls.description: Manage and mitigate cryptographic, encryption, and key management risks.

controls.title: Key Management Lifecycle
controls.description: Manage cryptographic keys through their lifecycle, including generation, distribution, storage, use, revocation, and destruction.

controls.title: CSC Key Management Capability
controls.description: Provide the capability for cloud service customers to manage their own data encryption keys.

controls.title: Encryption and Key Management Audit
controls.description: Perform audit activities related to cryptographic, encryption, and key management activities.

controls.title: Key Recovery
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures to support key recovery.

controls.title: Key Inventory Management
controls.description: Maintain an inventory of all cryptographic keys, including ownership, type, usage dates, and expiration.

controls.title: CEK Monitoring
controls.description: Monitor key management system activities and performance metrics.

controls.title: CEK Reporting
controls.description: Report on cryptographic, encryption, and key management metrics.

controls.title: CEK Training and Awareness
controls.description: Provide training and awareness regarding cryptographic, encryption, and key management systems.

controls.title: Key Compromise
controls.description: Define and implement procedures to manage the impact of compromised encryption keys.

controls.title: Key Storage
controls.description: Protect cryptographic keys during storage, including secure backup and recovery measures.

controls.title: Key Rotation
controls.description: Rotate encryption keys per established cryptographic, encryption, and key management policies.

controls.title: Key Revocation
controls.description: Define and implement procedures to revoke encryption keys when required.

controls.title: Key Destruction
controls.description: Define and implement procedures for secure destruction of encryption keys.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.description: Perform a risk assessment to identify threats and vulnerabilities to the key management system.

controls.title: Key Management System
controls.description: Implement a key management system to securely manage the lifecycle of cryptographic keys.

controls.title: Datacenter Security Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for the secure operation of data centers.

controls.title: Off-Site Authorization
controls.description: Maintain policies, procedures, and processes to authorize the relocation or transfer of hardware, software, or data/information to an off-site location.

controls.title: Off-Site Equipment
controls.description: Maintain policies, procedures, and supporting business processes to protect and secure equipment that is used and/or stored at off-site locations.

controls.title: Secure Area Authorization
controls.description: Define and implement processes for authorizing access to controlled physical areas.

controls.title: Secure Area Network Connectivity
controls.description: Monitor and audit network connectivity to and within the secure areas at regular intervals.

controls.title: Secure Area Surveillance
controls.description: Implement and maintain surveillance capabilities for the secure areas.

controls.title: Equipment Identification
controls.description: Identify, label, and manage all equipment within the secure area.

controls.title: Equipment Power
controls.description: Protect and secure datacenter utility services and environmental conditions.

controls.title: Equipment Location
controls.description: Locate and protect equipment from environmental hazards and unauthorized access.

controls.title: Secure Disposal of Equipment
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for the disposal and decommissioning of equipment.

controls.title: Equipment Maintenance
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for the maintenance of equipment.

controls.title: Cabling Security
controls.description: Protect cabling from interception, interference, and damage.

controls.title: Environmental Systems
controls.description: Implement environmental systems, including fire detection and suppression, temperature and humidity controls, and water detection.

controls.title: Automated Environmental Conditions
controls.description: Automate monitoring and management of environmental conditions within the datacenter.

controls.title: Secure Access Points
controls.description: Control and monitor all access points to datacenter facilities.

controls.title: Data Security and Privacy Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for data security and privacy, including personal data processing.

controls.title: Secure Disposal
controls.description: Define and implement procedures for the secure disposal of data, including any copies.

controls.title: Personal Data Processing Purposes
controls.description: Define and document the purpose of personal data processing.

controls.title: Personal Data Retention and Deletion
controls.description: Define retention and deletion procedures for personal data.

controls.title: Data Flow Documentation
controls.description: Create and maintain data flow documentation to identify what data is processed, stored, or transmitted, and by whom.

controls.title: Data Ownership and Stewardship
controls.description: Establish and maintain data ownership, classification, and stewardship.

controls.title: Data Protection by Design and Default
controls.description: Implement data protection measures by design and by default.

controls.title: Data Privacy by Design and Default
controls.description: Implement data privacy measures by design and by default.

controls.title: Personal Data Sub-processors
controls.description: Maintain a list of personal data sub-processors and monitor their compliance.

controls.title: Sensitive Data Transfer
controls.description: Define and implement procedures for the transfer of sensitive data.

controls.title: Personal Data Access, Reversal, Rectification, and Deletion
controls.description: Provide the capability for data subjects to access, correct, and delete their personal data.

controls.title: Limitation of Purpose in Personal Data Processing
controls.description: Ensure personal data is processed in accordance with its stated purpose and not beyond.

controls.title: Personal Data Portability
controls.description: Enable data subjects to obtain and transfer their personal data in a structured, commonly used format.

controls.title: Disclosure of Data Sub-processors
controls.description: Disclose all data sub-processors to the data controller.

controls.title: Limitation of Production Data
controls.description: Restrict the use of production data in non-production environments.

controls.title: Data Retention and Deletion Policy
controls.description: Define and implement data retention and deletion policies and procedures.

controls.title: Data Protection Impact Assessment
controls.description: Conduct data protection impact assessments for personal data processing activities.

controls.title: Disclosure Notification
controls.description: Notify affected data subjects and authorities of data breaches in accordance with applicable regulations.

controls.title: Data Location
controls.description: Define and implement capabilities to identify the physical location of data, including storage and processing.

controls.title: Governance Program Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for an information governance program.

controls.title: Risk Management Program
controls.description: Define and implement an enterprise risk management program aligned with applicable regulatory and statutory requirements.

controls.title: Organizational Policy Reviews
controls.description: Review all organizational policies at planned intervals and after significant changes.

controls.title: Approved Exception Process
controls.description: Define and implement an exceptions process as mandated by the governance program.

controls.title: Information Security Program
controls.description: Develop, implement, and evaluate an information security program, including assigned resources, to protect the organization.

controls.title: Governance Responsibility Model
controls.description: Define and document roles and responsibilities for planning, implementing, and managing the governance program.

controls.title: Information System Regulatory Mapping
controls.description: Define and map regulatory, statutory, and contractual compliance requirements to the information system.

controls.title: Special Interest Groups
controls.description: Establish and maintain contact with cloud-related special interest groups and other security forums.

controls.title: Human Resources Security Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for human resources security.

controls.title: Acceptable Use of Technology Policy
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain an acceptable use of technology policy.

controls.title: Clean Desk Policy
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain a clean desk policy.

controls.title: Return of Assets
controls.description: Establish and implement processes for the return of organizational assets upon termination of employment or contract.

controls.title: Assets Management
controls.description: Establish and maintain an inventory of organization assets and classify by business criticality.

controls.title: Employment Agreements
controls.description: Define and implement terms and conditions for employment, including information security and privacy responsibilities.

controls.title: Employment Termination
controls.description: Define and implement procedures for the orderly termination of employment relationships.

controls.title: Employment Termination Information Access
controls.description: Revoke employee access to data, assets, and information systems upon termination of employment.

controls.title: Background Screening Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Perform background verification checks on all new employees.

controls.title: Non-Disclosure Agreements
controls.description: Require all employees, contractors, and third parties to sign non-disclosure agreements.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain a security awareness training program.

controls.title: Personal and Sensitive Data Awareness and Training
controls.description: Provide awareness and training on the handling of personal and sensitive data.

controls.title: Compliance User Responsibility
controls.description: Define, document, and communicate responsibilities related to compliance.

controls.title: Identity and Access Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for identity and access management.

controls.title: Strong/Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for authenticating access to systems and data using multi-factor authentication.

controls.title: Identity Inventory
controls.description: Manage, store, and review system identities, including user, device, and service identities.

controls.title: Separation of Duties
controls.description: Employ the separation of duties principle when implementing information system access.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege to ensure users only have the minimum access necessary to perform their duties.

controls.title: User Access Provisioning
controls.description: Define and implement a user access provisioning process which authorizes, records, and communicates access changes.

controls.title: User Access Review
controls.description: Review and revalidate user access at regular planned intervals.

controls.title: User Access Revocation
controls.description: Define and implement a process to revoke or modify user access according to the user access provisioning and revocation policy.

controls.title: Segregation of Privileged Access Roles
controls.description: Segregate and manage privileged access separately from regular access.

controls.title: Management of Privileged Access Roles
controls.description: Define and manage assignment and scope of privileged access roles for all identities.

controls.title: CSC Authorization over CSP User Access
controls.description: Provide cloud service customers the capability to authorize access to their data and resources.

controls.title: Safeguard Logs Integrity
controls.description: Safeguard the integrity of identity and access management logs.

controls.title: Uniquely Identifiable Users
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures to ensure all users are uniquely identifiable.

controls.title: Strong Password Policy
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures to enforce strong password policies.

controls.title: Passwords Management
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for the management of passwords.

controls.title: Authorization Mechanisms
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate authorization mechanisms for access to organization-owned or managed assets.

controls.title: Interoperability and Portability Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for interoperability and portability.

controls.title: Application Interface Availability
controls.description: Provide application interfaces to cloud service customers so they can retrieve their content and export it to other CSPs.

controls.title: Secure Interoperability and Portability Management
controls.description: Implement cryptographically secure and standardized network protocols for the management, import, and export of data.

controls.title: Data Portability Contractual Obligations
controls.description: Include data portability provisions in contractual agreements.

controls.title: Infrastructure and Virtualization Security Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for infrastructure and virtualization security.

controls.title: Capacity and Resource Planning
controls.description: Plan and monitor the availability, quality, and adequate capacity of resources.

controls.title: Network Security
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical defense-in-depth measures for protection, detection, and timely response to network-based attacks.

controls.title: OS Hardening and Base Controls
controls.description: Harden host and guest operating system images, including removing unnecessary services, applications, and protocols, and configuring security settings.

controls.title: Production and Non-Production Environments
controls.description: Separate production and non-production environments.

controls.title: Segmentation and Segregation
controls.description: Design, develop, deploy, and configure applications and infrastructures such that CSP and CSC access is segmented and segregated.

controls.title: Migration to Cloud Environments
controls.description: Use secure migration practices when migrating systems to cloud environments.

controls.title: Network Architecture Documentation
controls.description: Document and maintain the network architecture, identifying all relevant security controls.

controls.title: Network Defense
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and defense-in-depth techniques for network defense.

controls.title: Logging and Monitoring Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for logging and monitoring.

controls.title: Security Event Logging
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures to ensure the logging of security events.

controls.title: Security Monitoring and Alerting
controls.description: Identify and monitor security-relevant events, implement security alerts, and evaluate incident resolution.

controls.title: Log Protection
controls.description: Protect logs from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.

controls.title: Audit Logs Monitoring and Response
controls.description: Monitor, review, and respond to audit log events.

controls.title: Clock Synchronization
controls.description: Synchronize all relevant information processing system clocks with an authoritative time source.

controls.title: Logging Scope
controls.description: Define the scope and applicability of logging activities.

controls.title: Log Records
controls.description: Define the specific content of log records.

controls.title: Log Access and Accountability
controls.description: Control and monitor access to log data to ensure accountability.

controls.title: Encryption Monitoring and Reporting
controls.description: Monitor and report on encryption activities and key management events.

controls.title: Transaction/Activity Logging
controls.description: Log and monitor all transactions and activities.

controls.title: Access Control Logs
controls.description: Log and monitor access control events.

controls.title: Failures and Anomalies Reporting
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes to report and respond to identified security failures and anomalies.

groups.name: Security Incident Management, E-Discovery & Cloud Forensics (SEF)

controls.title: Security Incident Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for security incident management.

controls.title: Service Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain service management policies and procedures.

controls.title: Incident Response Plans
controls.description: Establish, document, and maintain incident response plans that contain roles, responsibilities, and communication procedures.

controls.title: Incident Response Testing
controls.description: Test incident response plans at planned intervals or upon significant organizational or environmental changes.

controls.title: Incident Response Metrics
controls.description: Implement metrics to measure the efficiency of incident response.

controls.title: Event Triage Processes
controls.description: Establish, document, and implement event triage processes for security-related events.

controls.title: Evidence Collection and Preservation
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate evidence collection and preservation procedures.

controls.title: Incident Communication
controls.description: Establish communication and notification procedures for incidents to internal and external stakeholders.

controls.title: Supply Chain Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for supply chain management.

controls.title: Supply Chain Risk Management
controls.description: Develop, implement, and evaluate supply chain risk management processes.

controls.title: Third-Party Agreements
controls.description: Require that service level agreements address and incorporate security requirements.

controls.title: Supply Chain Service Agreement Review
controls.description: Review supply chain service agreements to ensure applicable security requirements are met.

controls.title: Internal Compliance Testing
controls.description: Define and implement processes for compliance testing of supply chain partners.

controls.title: Supply Chain Governance Review
controls.description: Perform periodic governance reviews of supply chain partners.

controls.title: Supply Chain Data Security Assessment
controls.description: Perform data security impact assessments of supply chain partners.

controls.title: Supply Chain Inventory
controls.description: Maintain an inventory of all supply chain relationships.

controls.title: Primary Service and Contractual Agreement
controls.description: Define primary service level agreements and contractual requirements with supply chain partners.

controls.title: Supply Chain Metric Reporting
controls.description: Report supply chain metrics to key stakeholders.

controls.title: Third Party Providers
controls.description: Assess and manage risks associated with third-party providers.

controls.title: Supply Chain Agreements Compliance Verification
controls.description: Verify compliance of supply chain agreements periodically.

controls.title: Supply Chain Governance Responsibility
controls.description: Define and assign governance responsibilities for supply chain management.

controls.title: Supply Chain Changes
controls.description: Evaluate and manage changes to supply chain relationships.

controls.title: Threat and Vulnerability Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for threat and vulnerability management.

controls.title: Malware Protection Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for the detection and protection against malware.

controls.title: Vulnerability Remediation Schedule
controls.description: Define and maintain a vulnerability remediation schedule aligned with organizational risk appetite.

controls.title: Detection Updates
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate mechanisms for keeping malware detection and prevention tools up to date.

controls.title: External Library Vulnerabilities
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for monitoring and managing external library vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Penetration Testing
controls.description: Perform penetration testing at planned intervals and after significant changes.

controls.title: Vulnerability Identification
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes, procedures, and technical measures for vulnerability identification.

controls.title: Vulnerability Prioritization
controls.description: Define, implement, and evaluate processes to prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk.

controls.title: Vulnerability Management Reporting
controls.description: Report vulnerability management metrics to key stakeholders.

controls.title: Vulnerability Management Metrics
controls.description: Define and monitor metrics for the vulnerability management program.

controls.title: Endpoint Devices Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate, and maintain policies and procedures for managing endpoint devices.

controls.title: Application and Service Approval
controls.description: Define and implement an approval process for application and service use on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Compatibility
controls.description: Define and implement processes to validate the compatibility and interoperability of endpoint devices.

controls.title: Endpoint Device Configuration
controls.description: Define and implement configuration requirements for endpoint devices.

controls.title: Endpoint Management
controls.description: Define and implement an endpoint management process.

controls.title: Automatic Lock Screen
controls.description: Configure endpoints to automatically lock screens after a defined period of inactivity.

controls.title: Operating Systems
controls.description: Manage and monitor operating system versions on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Storage Encryption
controls.description: Encrypt storage on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Anti-Malware Detection and Prevention
controls.description: Define and implement anti-malware detection and prevention capabilities on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Software Firewall
controls.description: Implement software firewalls on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Data Loss Prevention
controls.description: Implement data loss prevention capabilities on endpoint devices.

controls.title: Remote Locate
controls.description: Implement the capability to remotely locate endpoint devices.

controls.title: Remote Wipe
controls.description: Implement the capability to remotely wipe endpoint devices.

controls.title: Endpoint Device Inventory
controls.description: Maintain an inventory of all endpoint devices.
